response: A liquefied green sugar cube needs to be placed into one of three holes: star-shaped, square, or round. Which one should you choose?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a liquefied green sugar cube. Put it into one of these holes: the star-shaped one, the square one, or the round one. Which one?
